description: Cross-pipeline analytics summary. Waits for wwi_sales_etl and wwi_inventory_etl to complete before aggregating, then triggers wwi_reporting_refresh and waits for it to finish.

tasks.sql: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('day', CAST(o.OrderDate AS TIMESTAMP)) AS SalesDate, c.CustomerName, sp.SalespersonName, COUNT(DISTINCT o.OrderID) AS OrderCount, SUM(ol.Quantity) AS TotalUnits, ROUND(SUM(ol.Quantity * ol.UnitPrice), 2) AS TotalRevenue, ROUND(SUM(ol.Quantity * ol.UnitPrice * ol.TaxRate / 100.0), 2) AS TotalTax, ROUND(SUM(ol.Quantity * ol.UnitPrice * (1 + ol.TaxRate / 100.0)), 2) AS TotalRevenueIncTax, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS etl_loaded_at FROM wwi_sales_etl.order_header o JOIN wwi_sales_etl.order_lines_detail ol ON o.OrderID = ol.OrderID LEFT JOIN wwi_sales_etl.raw_customers c ON o.CustomerID = c.CustomerID LEFT JOIN wwi_sales_etl.raw_salespeople sp ON o.SalespersonPersonID = sp.PersonID GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('day', CAST(o.OrderDate AS TIMESTAMP)), c.CustomerName, sp.SalespersonName

SELECT ol.StockItemID, ol.StockItemDescription, SUM(ol.Quantity) AS TotalUnitsSold, COUNT(DISTINCT ol.OrderID) AS OrderCount, ROUND(SUM(ol.Quantity * ol.UnitPrice), 2) AS TotalRevenue, ROUND(AVG(ol.UnitPrice), 2) AS AvgUnitPrice, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS etl_loaded_at FROM wwi_sales_etl.order_lines_detail ol GROUP BY ol.StockItemID, ol.StockItemDescription ORDER BY TotalUnitsSold DESC

tasks.message: wwi_analytics_summary completed for {{ ds }} — DailyRevenueSummary and ProductVelocity updated.
